examples: As soon as the bristles on your toothbrush begin to wear, throw it out.
The toothbrush gently removes plaque without damaging the gums or causing bleeding.
How do you choose your toothbrush?
At a minimum, spend an hour with a toothbrush and some bleach and scrub that grout.
